name: SnapScan
description: South African QR code payment platform with 60,000+ merchants and API for mobile and in-person transactions.

seo.title: SnapScan — Payment Gateway / PSP
seo.meta_description: SnapScan: South African QR code payment platform with 60,000+ merchants and API for mobile and in-person transactions.

when_to_use: QR code payments for South African merchants at events and retail
API-driven payment confirmation for 60k+ SnapScan merchants
Mobile-first in-person payments without card terminal hardware

pros: Dominant QR payment network in South Africa
60k+ merchant acceptance out of the box
Simple API for mobile and in-person flows
cons: Limited payment method breadth beyond QR
Smaller dev community and third-party tooling
review.verdict: The default QR rail for South African merchants, but irrelevant outside that single market.
review.best_for: South African SMBs and apps needing fast QR and mobile acceptance
review.not_for: Businesses operating outside ZA or needing card-present processing

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Usage-based metered billing scales up and down
